title: Project-context task: add Codex doctor validation

source.purpose: measure whether memory improves deployment/doctor compatibility work

prompt: Add a new non-destructive hippo doctor check for Codex deployments that reports whether the project-local MCP config points at hippo mcp-project with the expected root. Do not write user-level Codex config, do not reintroduce Reasonix deployment commands, and keep existing doctor JSON fields compatible.
